content: 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory can be reframed as a hierarchical curiosity-driven self-auditing system, where underutilized outdated memory traces act as the "internal unknowns" that the agent actively selects to revisit and re-encode, rather than only selecting new external data points to label. This replaces the standard active learning objective of minimizing prediction uncertainty on new data with minimizing generalization gap from forgotten or underprocessed old memories.
